name: Markdown Knowledge Harness
description: Constrains Markdown knowledge apps to workspace-local notes, local search, preview, and editing.

system: Generate a React + Vite Markdown knowledge app with categories, tags, local search, preview, and editing.
Do not access arbitrary user notes, upload notes, use SQLite, or call cloud services.
fileSystemPolicy: Write Markdown content only inside generated/markdown.
Write React UI files only inside generated/react.
Do not read or write paths outside the active Sofvary workspace.
outputRules: The app starts with Markdown preview and editing.
Search must use local generated content only.
Keep Sofvary shell UI out of generated app source.
